entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Learning: What’s New in the 2H 2024 Release
entry.content:
The SAP SuccessFactors 2H 2024 release has introduced a range of new features and improvements to elevate the learning experience. Here’s an overview of the highlights you need to know. 

Note: Some upgrades are currently under investigation by the SAP Learning Engineering team.

1. Approvals for Learning Requests: A Streamlined Experience

Managers, instructors, and HRBPs now have a streamlined way to approve or decline learning requests directly from the new Learning home page. This feature lets approvers manage internal and external training requests, user account requests, and course completions (with or without e-signatures) in one place. With the “Requests for Me” section, you can prioritize and manage approvals seamlessly, ensuring that important requests are promptly addressed.

 

2. Automatic Import of Open Content Network (OCN) Items

To reduce the administrative burden, SAP SuccessFactors Learning now supports automatic import of learning content from OCN providers. With a few configuration changes, admins can set up a process to import new OCN courses automatically, keeping content fresh and eliminating the need for manual updates. This is a great addition for organizations that rely on OCN providers for diverse learning content.

 

 

3. Enhanced Library Browsing with the Browse Library Feature

SAP has enhanced search functionality by adding the Browse Library feature. Learners can now filter library search results by categories, making it easier to find relevant learning activities. This update simplifies navigation and helps learners quickly access the resources they need to enhance their skills.

Note: While testing on my instance, this isnt working. SAP has marked as known issue and is under investigation by SAP engineering team.

Error I see : 

Looks like something went wrong.

 

4. Creating Custom Pages on the New Learning Home Page

You can now create custom pages on the Learning home page, tailored to specific groups within your organization. These pages can include up to five banners and eight cards per section. With this feature, you can customize learning content, create a unique experience for different user groups, and help learners easily find relevant learning activities.

Note: This took a while to reflect on home page.

 

6. Disable Option For The New Learning Experience Removed

SAP has removed the option to disable to New Learning Experience to progress towards the deprecation of the legacy experience in a future release.

 

7. New Team View for SuccessFactors Learning

If you’re using the new Learning home page, you can now access the updated Team View page to manage and review learning assignments for your team. To open the Team View page, simply go to the Dashboards menu on the Learning home page and select Team View. Your team members will appear in a list on the left side of the page.

By selecting a team member, you’ll see their detailed learning information in the right-hand detail view. If you have permissions to view team members as an alternate manager or HR business partner, a drop-down menu will appear next to the My Team header, allowing you to choose the appropriate role. Team members are listed alphabetically, with those who have overdue items shown first. The More Actions menu offers the following options for managing your team members:

  • Manage Assignments
  • Add to Learning History
  • Manage Enrollment

You can also explore individual learning details for each team member and take specific actions as needed.

 

8. Use AI to Associate Skills With Open Content Network Items

Its AI everywhere, you can use the AI-assisted capabilities to associate skills with Open Content Network (OCN) items based on the predefined skills provided by the OCN providers.

 

9. Learning History Page Updates

Based on user feedback, SAP SuccessFactors has made the Learning History page cleaner by removing columns that weren’t widely used, such as Type and Ratings. Credit hours are now available only in the Completed Activity Details section, making the page more focused and easier to navigate.

10. The New Learning Home Page Now Supports Delegation Tasks

The delegate user can now switch their role temporarily to act as their manager directly on the new Learning home page. When managers or supervisors (delegator) assign another user (delegate) to act on their behalf under certain requirements.

 

Final Thoughts

The 2H 2024 release of SAP SuccessFactors Learning introduces valuable enhancements in automation, streamlined processes, and an improved experience for both administrators and learners. With these updates, organizations can provide more tailored and secure learning environments while reducing the administrative workload. Explore these new features to elevate your organization’s learning experience today!

entry.title: Re: Options to manipulate the subject name ID coming from the corporate IdP in proxy scenarios
entry.content:
Hi  @istvanbokor 

thank you very much for this blog.

In Option 3, if I can manage user/ chenge user attributes direct in IAS, for example, updating the phone number, won’t it be the case that during the next IPS job, the old user attributes (e.g., old phone number in Azure) will be provisioned back into IAS and overwrite the new changes made in IAS (e.g., the new phone number)?

Many Thanks

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Azure Databricks Database integration with Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is it possible to connect and poll Azure Databricks Database and fetch the records by executing query statement? Once the records are fetched using SAP Datssphere then later SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration) should be able to pull the data from Datasphere? what are the possible options that SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration) can pull the data from Datasphere? Could you please guide me on steps and pre-requisites to achieve this requirement using Datasphere?

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: SAP B1 9.3PL11 DI Create a draft of accounts receivable invoice using the shipped goods account
entry.content:
I need to create a draft of the accounts receivable invoice based on the delivery status


But after creation, it was found that the account using shipped goods in the accounting label was not automatically selected


The actual shipment is consistent with the selected shipment product account


I tried to set the option to use a shipping account when creating a draft of the accounts receivable invoice,
But it has no effect
Invoice.UseShpdGoodsAct = SAPbobsCOM.BoYesNoEnum.tYES;

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 9.3PL11 DI Create a draft of accounts receivab...
entry.content:
I need to create a draft of the accounts receivable invoice based on the delivery status


But after creation, it was found that the account using shipped goods in the accounting label was not automatically selected


The actual shipment is consistent with the selected shipment product account


I tried to set the option to use a shipping account when creating a draft of the accounts receivable invoice,
But it has no effect

entry.title: Re: Price changes in Service Order Item category SEW2:Fix...
entry.content:
Hi Soma,

in a fixed price scenario, the billing price is determined from the service order, and not the service confirmation. Therefore, after releasing the service order item, you will not be able to change the price:

Seems to me that the fixed price order is not the right fit for your requirement - if you are looking to adapt the price to be billed after the purchase order, why don't you consider the regular time & material service order, with which you can flexibly change the price during the service confirmation?

Best regards
Varun

entry.title: Re: Running Your Own Blockchain on The SAP BTP Kyma Trial: A Hands On How To Guide 🚀
entry.content:
I've just run through the procedure again, the Kyma API Rules Urls are now here:

 

and there is  now a 14 Day Trial Public Blockchain running on SAP BTP Kyma here:

https://atkrypto-v1.c-45c2600.kyma.ondemand.com/

https://atkrypto-v2.c-45c2600.kyma.ondemand.com/

to save using Postman, there is a test cockpit as well

 

https://atkrypto-v1.c-45c2600.kyma.ondemand.com/cockpit.html

https://atkrypto-v2.c-45c2600.kyma.ondemand.com/cockpit.html

Have fun with your Blockchains on the SAP BTP Kyma

 

Andy.

entry.title: Re: Why i can insert records into standart table?
entry.content: The lines are updated (whatever it's insert, update, delete) because there's an implicit Database Commit after the execution of a program (concept of memory roll-in/roll-out in dialog work processes). Do an SQL trace and you'll see. I recommend to always indicate explicitly commit and rollback in your Executables Programs.

entry.title: Hello World.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am a data analyst with 3 years of experience in project and resource management in an IT/MNC. I am also a student current pursuing my MBA in Human Resource Management and exploring jobs in Talent Industry.

In the process of learning about talent industry, I understand that more than theoretical knowledge, job roles require hands-on experience of the skill, HCM in my case, in a valued platform.

When I came across SAP's Digital skills intitative, I decided to grab the opportunity to explore more on one of the Niche skills and have started SAP HCM learning journey. 

I am glad i stumbled upon this Initiative : )  

Thanks for the great learning opportunity, Team.

entry.title: Re: Table for available budget for project in SAP
entry.content: There's more than one way to get this. The easiest way is to check in the RPSCO table, which is the same one that the S_ALR_87013558 report uses.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am a women, who have worked as a ERP consultant for around 2 years. However, my current experience is all about Oracle, and I would love to grab details about SAP to upgrade myself. I know the requirements for SAP integration of enterprises are huge, so it will be great if I could improve my knowledge of this field to help better the contribution to my company.

It would be highly appreciated if I receive the free attempt of SAP examination.

Sincerely,

Nancy

entry.title: Re: Element "timestamp" is not available in my ABAP CDS V...
entry.content:
if your system is not that old, you should use cdc for delta

timestamp based delta is obsolete.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/cds-based-data-extraction-part-ii-delta-handling/ba-p/13425761

entry.title: PSM Funds Management Closing Operations
entry.content:
Hi All

I am working on Budgeting in Funds Management. In the closing operations we have FMDM -Closing Operations Monitor. Here Carry fwd budget for commitments is disallowed                     ( Screenshot). My project requires to carry forward of budget for commitments to next year. How I can make it allowed. 

Please let me know

entry.title: Re: TDS U/S 194 Q
entry.content:
TDS Rule 194 sec.

 TDS is deducted at 10% under section 194 if the dividend amount is more than 5000 in a year.

entry.title: Carry forward of Residual Budget to next year
entry.content:
Hi 

I want to carryover residual budget to next year. I execute Tcode FMMPCOVRN for this. Every time I run this it shows error like -Release and Budget amounts are inconsistent or the Budget amount is not sufficient for the release. I also tried with Budget with automatic release.  Please let me know how to resolve the issue

entry.title: Meetup Fortaleza 2024
entry.content:
SIT 2024 alignment.
Presentation of Ideas and Planning for the next SITFOR in 2025.

SAP consultants and the community are invited at 7 pm 

JP Steak House | Restaurante, Rodízio - Fortaleza

entry.title: Re: How to Add Fiscal Year Variants in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Verena_Stuetz,

what about companies that need to have a 4+4+5 period variant in a group with companies that report in K4 in the same tenant?

According to the documentation rules its not possible, because the start and end day of the periods don't match. 

Is this an impossible scenario, or am i reading something wrong?

Thanks,

Sandra Correia
